title: Beta v0.104.0 — Conflagration/Drum rework, Parry-on-Blade, card art, ancient buffs
features: Three new badges: Damage Leader (most damage in multiplayer), Debuffer (most debuffs applied in multiplayer), C-c-c-Combo (20 cards in a single turn).

Ironclad reworks: Conflagration is now `Deal 2 damage to ALL enemies 4(5) times` — a simpler AOE / Strength payout. Drum of Battle flipped from Power to Skill — `Draw 2 cards. When this card is Exhausted, gain 2(3) Energy`, giving Exhaust decks a new synergy piece.

Regent's Parry rework: Sovereign Blade now *displays and absorbs* the 10(14) Block directly, instead of Parry granting it to the player. Scales with Dexterity / Frail and opens up new relic interactions.

Ancient buffs: Neow's Fury now lets you pick which 2 cards come back (or fewer). Neow's Booming Conch also grants +1 Energy at Elite combats. Tezcatara's Nutritious Soup now also makes all Strikes deal +3 damage.

Art pass: portrait art added for Feral, Not Yet, Spite, Fight Through, Hailstorm, Synchronize, Iteration, Voltaic, Apparition, Abrasive. Vakuu gets background art and VFX, Skulking Colony gets animations. New Neow's Fury artwork. Tunneler / Entomancer / Mawler updated, Vantom / Ceremonial Beast / Entomancer animation refreshed.
Axebots encounter reworked: one stronger Axebot instead of the old pair.

Gradual Ascension curve adjustment begins — Scrolls of Biting, Owl Magistrate, and Slimed Berserker get slightly less HP at low Ascension and slightly more at high Ascension. Waterfall Giant heals less at low Ascension. Vantom Dismember and Slippery scaled back at low Ascension.

Multiplayer tuning: Artifact / Slippery / Skittish enemy-power scaling nerfed. Tag Team's Replay now triggers on 'deal damage to ALL enemies' attacks too. Stratagem unbanned from colorless pool (the underlying MP bug was fixed).
Ascension first-time tutorial popup for both single-player and multiplayer explains the 0–10 difficulty ladder on your first clear.

Writing clarifications: Brilliant Scarf now says 'played from your hand' so auto-played cards clearly don't count. Reaper Form's text reworked so it's clear the Doom comes from the power, not the card.
fixes: Terminal run modifier can no longer bring a player below 1 HP.

Card play ordering: Howl From Beyond and Bombardment now play from Exhaust *after* you draw your hand, not before. I Am Invincible now triggers *before* hand discard. Tyranny triggers before Bombardment (so a Tyranny-exhausted Bombardment still plays). Summon Forth moves existing Sovereign Blades to Hand before Forging, not after.
Silent — Nightmare: the duplicated copies it adds next turn no longer keep an Affliction that was on the source. Untouchable: upgraded Block +2 → +3.

Ancients — Tezcatara's Nutritious Soup blessing now gated on having Strikes in your deck. Vakuu's Whispering Earring correctly plays Stardust. Unceasing Top triggers when Whispering Earring plays the last card. Leafy Poultice no longer transforms Talisman-upgraded Strikes/Defends when both come from Neow's Bones.

Crashes fixed: applying powers to dying creatures, closing during startup before saves init, upgrading at rest site, entering rooms, Osty dying mid-scene-transition, Linux UI-element-removed-mid-frame combat crash.

Softlocks fixed: combat softlock after main-menu-and-resume, old-version run histories, save operations now fault-tolerant, Battleworn Dummy event on death, Driftwood relic on first run in MP, treasure-room load with controller teammate.

Relics: The Boot no longer amplifies Bad Luck's Intangible damage from 1 to 5. Self-Forming Clay no longer triggers on Terminal's max-HP loss. Regalite no longer gains Block from enemies applying statuses.

Events: Foul Potion can be given to the Fake Merchant now. Infested Automaton no longer offers off-class cards. Spoils Map quest cards get properly removed on completion and each copy now pays 600 gold.

Multiplayer: state divergence from a just-pre-combat potion use fixed. Dense Vegetation no longer appears when any player is under 8 HP. Pael's Legion / Vambrace block-proc now works when the owner blocks another player. Pillar of Creation / Supermassive / Arsenal now credit the Largesse player, not the card recipient. Knight Gang + Armaments rare issue fixed. Timeout error 5008 now shows the correct message. Can't start a loaded MP game solo.
Potions: Not Yet is no longer generatable via Skill Potion. Parafright illusion loses negative Strength from Dark Shackles when killed for the turn.

Misc: targeting dead enemies with a controller, opening card-pile screen while targeting with a controller, Daily score floor count, Ascension 10 score, Game Over screen after multiple discoveries in Polish, offscreen Epoch indicator on Timeline.
In-game feedback now surfaces a clear error when the server didn't receive the submission (previously silent failure).
Merchant price adjustment across ~150 uncommon relics — base price lowered (e.g. Akabeko 250 → 225) continuing the Major Update #1 economy rebalance.
api_changes: Removed: `GET /api/powers/DRUM_OF_BATTLE` — Drum of Battle reworked from Power to Skill; the power entity no longer exists in the game.
Changed: `GET /api/cards/CONFLAGRATION`, `/api/cards/DRUM_OF_BATTLE`, `/api/cards/PARRY` — reworked effects reflected in description / vars / upgrade fields.
Changed: `GET /api/relics/*` — `merchant_price` fields (base / min / max) lowered for ~150 uncommon relics.

Changed: `GET /api/monsters/*` — HP ranges and attack-pattern amounts updated for Ruby Raider Assassin, Scrolls of Biting, Owl Magistrate, Slimed Berserker, Vantom, Waterfall Giant, and the reworked single-Axebot encounter.
Changed: `GET /api/events/SLIPPERY_BRIDGE` — choice precondition tweaked (no longer offers to remove the same card repeatedly).
No schema changes. All fields remain backwards-compatible.
